gameTitle: Yu Yu Hakusho: Ghost Files - Tournament Tactics

achievements.title: Fresh off the Boat
achievements.description: Win the preliminary match on the ship and enter Hanging Neck Island.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Team Urameshi
achievements.description: Reunite with all of your teammates at the hotel.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Infernal Hotel
achievements.description: Complete the final mission at the hotel without Overdrives using only 1 fighter. [Max level=10]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Bloodlust in the Forest
achievements.description: Reach your goal in the Forest's Timed Destination mission only after killing every demon. [No Deaths, Max level=10]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Infernal First Round
achievements.description: Complete the Chu-Zeru mission using Yusuke, Hiei, and only 1 other fighter. [No Deaths, Max level=10]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: The Leaders of Team Rokuyukai
achievements.description: Defeat Chu and Zeru in the first round of the Dark Tournament.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Infernal Forest
achievements.description: Complete the Roto-Rinku mission without Overdrives using Kuwabara, Kurama, and only 1 other fighter. [No Deaths, Max level=10]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Ice Maiden in Distress
achievements.description: Rescue Yukina from the clutches of Roto and Rinku and gain a new teammate.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Searching for Rinku
achievements.description: Chu temporarily joins Team Urameshi.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Interference
achievements.description: Defeat Babaki and Rugby of the Spirit Warriors. (2 missions)
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Infernal Second Round
achievements.description: Defeat the Dr. Ichigaki team using only Yusuke, Kuwabara, and the Masked Fighter. [No Deaths, Max level=15]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Team Urameshi vs. Team Ichigaki
achievements.description: Defeat Dr. Ichigaki and his three fighters in the second round of the Dark Tournament.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Infernal Cave
achievements.description: Complete the Gatasubal-Ogyokua mission without Overdrives using only Kurama, Hiei, and Chu [No Deaths, Max level=15
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Converting the Enemy
achievements.description: Chu and Rinku permanently join Team Urameshi.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Bloodlust in the Swamp
achievements.description: Defeat your target in the Swamp's Pursuit mission only after killing every other demon. [No Deaths, Max level=15]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Infernal Quarter-Finals
achievements.description: Complete the Bakken-Jin-Risho mission using only Kurama, Yusuke, and Kuwabara. [No Deaths, Max level=20]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Riding the Winds
achievements.description: Jin joins Team Urameshi.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Infernal Shinobi
achievements.description: Complete the Gama-Touya mission using only Kurama and Jin. [No Deaths, Max level=20]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Team Urameshi vs. Team Masho
achievements.description: Defeat the 5 members of Team Masho at the Swamp. (2 missions)
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: The Final Recruit
achievements.description: Touya joins Team Urameshi.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Bloodlust on the Beach
achievements.description: Defeat your target in the Ocean Cliffs' Pursuit mission only after killing every other demon. [Max level=20 and No Deaths]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Infernal Ocean Cliffs
achievements.description: Complete the far right Ocean Cliffs mission without Overdrives using no more than 3 fighters. [No Deaths, Max level=20]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: You... have... to...
achievements.description: Witness a tragic event at the Ocean Cliffs.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Infernal Semi-Finals
achievements.description: Complete the Shishiwakamaru-Suzuka mission using Kuwabara and only 1 other fighter. [No Deaths, Max level=25]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Infernal Fairy Tale
achievements.description: Complete the Kuro Momotaro-Ura Urashima-Makintaro mission using only Hiei and Kurama. [No Deaths, Max level=25]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Team Urameshi vs. Team Uraotogi
achievements.description: Defeat the 5 members of Team Uraotogi at Hanging Neck. (2 missions)
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Sneaking In
achievements.description: Complete the Dark Arena's Timed Destination mission without killing any demons and using only 1 fighter. [Max level=20]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Bloodlust Before the Gate
achievements.description: Reach your goal in the Dark Arena's Timed Destination mission only after killing every demon. [No Deaths, Max level=25]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Bloodlust in the Control Room
achievements.description: Defeat your target in the Dark Arena's Pursuit mission only after killing every other demon. [No Deaths, Max level=30]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Infernal Bomber
achievements.description: Complete Karasu's mission using Kurama and only 1 other fighter. [No Deaths, Max level=30]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: An Explosive Touch
achievements.description: Defeat Karasu of Team Toguro in the first match of the Dark Tournament Finals.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Infernal Armor
achievements.description: Complete Bui's mission using Hiei and only 1 other fighter. [No Deaths, Max level=30]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Felling the Giant
achievements.description: Defeat Bui of Team Toguro in the second match of the Dark Tournament Finals.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Infernal Shapeshifter
achievements.description: Complete Elder Toguro's mission using Kuwabara and only 1 other fighter. [No Deaths, Max level=30]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Dealing with Immortality
achievements.description: Defeat Elder Toguro of Team Toguro in the third match of the Dark Tournament Finals.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Infernal Power
achievements.description: Complete part 1 of the Younger Toguro mission using Yusuke and only 1 other fighter. [No Deaths, Max level=30]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Unrealized Potential
achievements.description: Complete the game with every character under level 30.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: One Wish
achievements.description: Defeat Younger Toguro while he's using 100% of his power to win the Dark Tournament.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Master of the Island
achievements.description: Complete all 74 missions on Hanging Neck Island.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: The Ultimate Team
achievements.description: Raise every character to level 32, the maximum level.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Infernal Ferry
achievements.description: Defeat the Captain and the Elite Guard without Overdrives using only 1 fighter.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Infernal Tortoise
achievements.description: Complete Genbu's mission using Kurama and only 1 other fighter. [No Deaths]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Infernal Tiger
achievements.description: Complete Byakko's mission using Kuwabara and only 1 other fighter. [No Deaths]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Infernal Dragon
achievements.description: Complete Seiryu's mission using Touya and only 1 other fighter. [No Deaths]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Infernal Sparrow
achievements.description: Complete Suzaku's mission using Yusuke and only 1 other fighter. [No Deaths]
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Master of the Dark Mountains
achievements.description: Complete all 5 missions in the Dark Mountains.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Killer Combo
achievements.description: Defeat 3 or more enemies with a single technique.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Show-Off
achievements.description: Have one fighter defeat 10 enemies in a single mission.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Master Sniper
achievements.description: Yusuke learns all possible techniques.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Master of the Sword
achievements.description: Kuwabara learns all possible techniques.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Master of Spirit Energy
achievements.description: Masked Fighter learns all possible techniques.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Master of Plants
achievements.description: Kurama learns all possible techniques.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Dragon Master
achievements.description: Hiei learns all possible techniques.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Master Healer
achievements.description: Yukina learns all possible techniques.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Drunken Master
achievements.description: Chu learns all possible techniques.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Yo-Yo Master
achievements.description: Rinku learns all possible techniques.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Master of Wind
achievements.description: Jin learns all possible techniques.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Master of Ice
achievements.description: Touya learns all possible techniques.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: An Item in Need
achievements.description: Equip your very first item.
achievements.author: mickyt888

achievements.title: Hoarder
achievements.description: Completely fill the inventory with items. (max=50)
achievements.author: mickyt888
